concerns.text: T010 (environment configuration) is placed LAST in Phase 2, but foundational tasks T004-T009 depend on configuration (random seed, device). T010 must precede T004-T009 to ensure config is available when those tasks execute.

T030 references FR-010 (error logging) for power-law fitting implementation, but FR-010 is about runtime error logging. Power-law fitting depends on FR-004 (specialization index) and FR-005 (retrieval efficiency) metrics. This creates incorrect dependency traceability.

Test tasks (T011-T012, T019-T020, T028-T029) are marked [P] (parallel-safe) alongside implementation tasks, but tests cannot execute in parallel with the implementation they validate. Tests should be written first (TDD) but marked as dependent on implementation completion for execution.

T007 (forgetting/decay) and T008 (memory consolidation/CREB) are marked foundational but implement features NOT authorized in spec.md (marked as 'future work' in plan.md Reviewer Feedback Integration). These tasks create false dependencies for downstream user stories.

T015 implements 'precise cue-driven retrieval validation logic' not present in spec.md requirements. While ordering within US1 is correct (after T014), this task creates untracked functionality that downstream tasks may implicitly depend on.
